commit.subject: LU-15132 hsm: reproducer
commit.message:
LU-15132 hsm: reproducer

Reproducer for LU-15132 ("Parallel data accesses on a release file
could hang a MDT")

Test-Parameters: fortestonly testlist=sanity-hsm,sanity-hsm
